title: Business Broker
description:
Fey Day Pte Ltd is a leading business brokerage firm in Singapore, committed to facilitating successful mergers, acquisitions, and sales of small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). We are looking for highly motivated and results-driven individuals to join our team as Business Brokers. This role is ideal for entrepreneurial professionals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and possess exceptional skills in sales, financial analysis, and relationship building.


Watch this YouTube video of a business broker role: https://youtu.be/xyNDeHjiG_g?si=U9gBXwmXs4QnHJ2d


💼 Key Responsibilities and Focus Areas

The Business Broker role at Fey Day is centered around three core pillars of success: Deal Origination, Managing the Deal, and Networking.


1. 🔍 Deal Origination (The Hunter)

This is the cornerstone of the role, requiring a proactive, sales-driven approach to identify and secure new business opportunities.

  • Lead Generation & Prospecting: Proactively identify and target potential sellers (business owners) and buyers (investors, corporations) across various industries in Singapore.
  • Market Analysis: Conduct continuous market research to identify trends, valuable businesses for sale, and potential synergistic acquisition targets.
  • Client Acquisition: Execute effective outreach strategies to secure initial consultations and exclusive brokerage mandates.
  • Valuation Assessment: Conduct preliminary business valuations, utilizing multiple methodologies, to determine a realistic market price for potential listings.


2. 📝 Managing the Deal (The Manager)

From listing to closing, this aspect demands meticulous project management, negotiation expertise, and financial acumen to guide clients through the entire transaction lifecycle.

  • Buyer Management: Screen, qualify, and manage inquiries from potential buyers, ensuring confidentiality and focusing on serious prospects.
  • Negotiation & Structuring: Lead and manage complex negotiations between buyers and sellers regarding price, terms, and conditions, ensuring a win-win outcome.
  • Due Diligence Coordination: Facilitate and manage the due diligence process, working closely with clients, accountants, lawyers, and other advisors to ensure a smooth and timely closing.
  • Closing: Drive the transaction to a successful closing, managing all final steps and documentation.


3. 🌐 Networking (The Connector)

Building and maintaining a robust professional network is crucial for sourcing leads, finding qualified buyers, and ensuring smooth deal execution.

  • Relationship Building: Cultivate strong, trusted relationships with business owners, entrepreneurs, high-net-worth individuals, and potential investors in the Singapore ecosystem.
  • Professional Partnerships: Establish and maintain active referral relationships with key professional services providers, including corporate lawyers, accountants, wealth managers, and bank loan officers.
  • Industry Presence: Actively attend and participate in industry events, trade shows, and networking functions to enhance the firm's visibility and generate proprietary deal flow.


🎯 Requirements & Qualifications

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or a related field.
  • Experience: Proven track record (3+ years) in a sales-intensive, deal-oriented role (e.g., consultancy, commercial real estate, or loan brokerage).
  • Financial Literacy: Strong understanding of financial statements, business valuation methods, and transaction structuring.
  • Skills: Exceptional communication, presentation, and negotiation skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
  • Singapore Context: Familiarity with the Singapore SME landscape, corporate regulatory environment, and typical transaction structures is highly advantageous.
  • Personal Attributes: Highly ethical, results-oriented, self-starter, with a high degree of emotional intelligence and professionalism.


✨ Why Join Fey Day?

We offer you plenty of learning, challenges and fun-filled experience.

Visit our website to learn more about us today! www.feyday.com

postedCompany.description: Fey Day is a business brokerage firm. We are industry agnostic and look at profitable business with an annual revenue of SGD 500k to 30 million.
postedCompany.name: FEY DAY PTE. LTD.
